name: fiebatt
description: Analyze, edit, compare, and export videos with the hosted Fiebatt service.

interface.longDescription: Upload footage, analyze scenes, generate localized edits, compare variants, preserve continuity, and export a finished video through Fiebatt's hosted editing service.
defaultPrompt: Analyze this video and suggest precise edits.
Edit one object in this video without changing the rest.
Open my Fiebatt projects and continue an edit.
